2603.21108.title: DMMRL: Disentangled Multi-Modal Representation Learning via Variational Autoencoders for Molecular Property Prediction
2603.21108.paper_summary: Molecular property prediction constitutes a cornerstone of drug discovery and materials science, necessitating models capable of disentangling complex structure-property relationships across diverse molecular modalities. Existing approaches frequently exhibit entangled representations--conflating structural, chemical, and functional factors--thereby limiting interpretability and transferability. Furthermore, conventional methods inadequately exploit complementary information from graphs, sequences, and geometries, often relying on naive concatenation that neglects inter-modal dependencies. In this work, we propose DMMRL, which employs variational autoencoders to disentangle molecular representations into shared (structure-relevant) and private (modality-specific) latent spaces, enhancing both interpretability and predictive performance. The proposed variational disentanglement mechanism effectively isolates the most informative features for property prediction, while orthogonality and alignment regularizations promote statistical independence and cross-modal consistency. Additionally, a gated attention fusion module adaptively integrates shared representations, capturing complex inter-modal relationships. Experimental validation across seven benchmark datasets demonstrates DMMRL's superior performance relative to state-of-the-art approaches. The code and data underlying this article are freely available at https://github.com/xulong0826/DMMRL.
2603.21108.paper_summary_zh: 分子性質預測是藥物發現和材料科學的基石，這需要能夠解開多樣分子模式中複雜結構-性質關係的模型。現有的方法經常表現出糾結的表徵——混合了結構、化學和功能因素——從而限制了解釋性和可轉移性。此外，傳統方法未能充分利用來自圖形、序列和幾何的互補信息，經常依賴於簡單的串接，忽略了模態之間的依賴性。在這項工作中，我們提出了DMMRL，它利用變分自編碼器將分子表徵解開為共享（結構相關）和私有（模態特定）潛在空間，增強了解釋性和預測性能。所提出的變分解開機制有效地隔離了對性質預測最具信息性的特徵，而正交性和對齊正則化則促進了統計獨立性和跨模態一致性。此外，一個門控注意力融合模塊自適應地整合共享表徵，捕捉複雜的模態間關係。對七個基準數據集的實驗驗證顯示，DMMRL相對於最先進的方法具有優越的性能。本文所依賴的代碼和數據可在 https://github.com/xulong0826/DMMRL 免費獲得。
2603.21108.author: Long Xu et.al.
2603.21108.authors: Long Xu, Junping Guo, Jianbo Zhao, Jianbo Lu, Yuzhong Peng
